title: A Collection Of Random Stuff (A.C.O.R.S.)
description: This mod adds a lot of random stuff to the game!
body:
A COLLECTION OF RANDOM STUFF

(A.C.O.R.S.)

This mod adds lots of random stuff to the game!!!

This includes things such as:

  • Many new colored blocks
  • New wood type (Milm, blue in color)
  • New animals
  • New enemies
  • New interesting biomes
  • New materials, tools, and armor (with tiers of tools and armor exceeding netherite)
  • New redstone components
  • New inventory storage components
  • New plants
  • New foods
  • Vertical planks
  • Hollowed logs
  • Rope
  • Chain fences
  • Tinted glass pane
  • Sprinkler
  • New stone types
  • More slabs, stairs and walls
  • More mossy blocks
  • And much more...
 
 
For Forge/NeoForge. JEI is HIGHLY recommended. You are allowed to use this mod in your modpacks if you'd like.
